│ › • 6. RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation │ │ 1 of 1 · Concept section · README.md │
│ │ │ Command preview: No direct launcher for this resource. │
│ │ │ LLMs have a knowledge cutoff and can't access your private data. **Retrieval-Augmented │
│ │ │ Generation (RAG)** solves this by adding a retrieval step before generation: search a │
│ │ │ knowledge base for relevant documents, inject them into the prompt, and let the model answer │
│ │ │ Inspect this resource here, then jump to Labs for runnable notebooks and scripts. │
